en: Immediate reporting of accidents, near misses, dangers, and safety defects must be required.\nEmployee Protection Act, Section 15(5)
Accident records must be retained for at least five years.\nEmployee Protection Act, Section 16(2)

Accidents resulting in more than three days of incapacity, any work-related death, and diagnosed occupational diseases must be reported to the responsible accident insurance institution within five days, including reporting occupational diseases within five days of onset.\nGeneral Social Insurance Act, Article 363(1)
Employer Accident Report to Accident Insurance Institution
